comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-05-05 after the VectorStore vault-persistence migration. Rebaselined because the previous 2026-05-03 baseline (2,299,691 B) was stale relative to HEAD (2,343,137 B) — multiple feature commits since (wiki-inbox table refactor, ollama-cloud provider, restrictedVaultAdapter, markdownPatch, deferred-tool fetcher, anthropic fetch patch). The migration itself swaps the IndexedDB-backed VectorStore (`idb` dep) for an in-memory + JSON-flush implementation routed through `VaultAdapter`, so embeddings persist at `<vault>/.leo/index/vectors/index.json` instead of in Obsidian's Electron IndexedDB origin store. This makes embeddings encrypted-at-rest when the vault lives on an encrypted volume. Net delta vs HEAD: -3,048 B (idb removal > new VectorStore body). Cap restored to 30 KB for incremental additions on top of this baseline.
